boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Callback date and invoice scope unresolved

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact current action boundary. The controlling control record (SRC-85E56C34309F-CTL) indicates the callback date and invoice scope are missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. Policy requires exact source closure before execution. No tone, urgency, vendor history, or prior paperwork substitutes for current source authority. ESCALATE.
